programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: While on a boating trip, Scott Carey (Grant Williams) is exposed to a radioactive cloud. Nothing seems amiss at first, but several months later Scott realizes that he's shrunk in height by several inches. He sees a doctor, who admits that he's baffled. As Scott continues to shrink, decreasing to three feet tall, he becomes bitter, and lashes out at his wife, Louise (Randy Stuart). He begins to fear a cure will never be found -- since even as he becomes a national sensation, he's still shrinking.

programme.title: Marilyn and Me
programme.desc: Joe Rabin returns to Israel in order to attend a reunion of Holocaust survivors after years of living in the United States. HIs daughter, Marcy, tags along on an assignment to write a magazine article about the World Gathering. During the war, Joe was separated from his pregnant girlfriend, and he hopes that upon his return, he can uncover what happened to her.

programme.title: Tinsel Town
programme.desc: A washed-up Hollywood action star takes a role in a small English village's Christmas pageant. With the help of the straight-talking choreographer and quirky cast, he embraces the holiday spirit to reconnect with his estranged daughter.

programme.title: Freejack [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Missed Connections
programme.desc: Recently divorced hairstylist, Jenny, on a mission to reconnect with Liam, her college sweetheart, is shocked to learn that he is "Dr. Love", the DJ she listens to on the radio. As the couple’s relationship slowly reignites, Jenny discovers that Liam is already engaged. Will Jenny’s heart break a second time, or can true love prevail?

programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Teletubbies (Classic)
programme.desc: Teletubbies stars iconic characters Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po. Their world is full of love and laughter as they explore Home Dome and the magical countryside of Teletubbyland through play and with the help of their touch screen tummies.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Monster High
programme.desc: Meet the WellieWishers™ - a sweet and lively group of friends who play in their whimsical garden. While the girls play, they learn about the natural world and experience the magic of their imaginations. Their sometimes silly, sometimes serious adventures allow them to explore the wonders of their garden - where all living things thrive and grow, along with creativity, friendship, and kindness.

While the girls play, they learn about the natural world and experience the magic of their imaginations. Their sometimes silly, sometimes serious adventures allow them to explore the wonders of their garden - where all living things thrive and grow, along with creativity, friendship, and kindness.

programme.desc: Pitufo Armonía ya no es bienvenido en el coro de los Pitufos: canta de una manera demasiado desafinada. Sin embargo, Papá Pitufo le entrega un amuleto que le convertirá en un virtuoso del canto. Y, por si fuera poco, aquí llega Hogata…
